issues.description: TrashFromHand trashes from hand, but effect text says 'from the top of your deck'. Should use ForceDiscard with appropriate filter, or a deck-specific trash action. If no deck-trash action exists in DSL, this is a significant deviation.

Duration is 'EndOfTurn', but text explicitly states 'during this turn'. Per duration rules, '[Your Turn]' phrasing requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not EndOfTurn. This is a critical timing distinction.
Target allows 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect says 'up to 1', meaning zero is also valid. Confirm target scope permits selection of 0 characters; if not, may need adjustment.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Trash 2 cards from the top of your deck and give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.
